- Goal: Recreate the Chromatic `examples/Page` `CheckIn` page as a sandbox screen
- Target user: Developers and designers validating Aegis mobile-like page composition
- Main job-to-be-done: Show a compact check-in form with app header, content form, primary/secondary actions, and a bottom navigation bar

- No matching service concept. This is a standalone sandbox page.

## Inferred Requirements
- [confidence: 0.99] The page should keep the original English labels from the Storybook example
- [confidence: 0.96] The layout should feel like a compact mobile app screen rather than a full desktop business layout
- [confidence: 0.95] The bottom navigation should visually match the example even though `BottomNavigation` is not available in the current Aegis package
- [confidence: 0.97] Primary action should show snackbar feedback to mirror the original example interaction

## Open Questions
- `BottomNavigation` exists in the upstream example source but is not exposed by the current installed Aegis package, so the sandbox uses Aegis icons and text inside a custom navigation shell instead.

## UI Mapping (Requirement -> Aegis Component)
- App header -> `Header` + `Header.Item` + `Header.Title` + `Menu`
- Overflow menu -> `IconButton` + `MenuTrigger` + `MenuContent` + `MenuItem`
- Main page heading -> `ContentHeader`
- Form layout -> `Form` + `FormControl`
- Text input -> `TextField`
- Office selector -> `Select`
- Desk selector -> `Combobox`
- Departure time -> `TimeField`
- Visit type -> `RadioGroup` + `Radio`
- Primary/secondary actions -> `ButtonGroup` + `Button`
- Success feedback -> `snackbar.show`
- Bottom navigation visuals -> `Icon` + `Text` inside a custom nav container
